title: 日本ダービーの後に・もはや神業！？

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I... I can't believe it... I won the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Could you pinch my cheeks just to make
absolutely certain?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. All of our fans are watching right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But seriously, how did you make it happen? I
wasn't in any condition to win.
choice_data_list: I just worked as hard as I could.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You just worked hard? That was enough to help
me win?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You know, you might be even more incredible
than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've gone well beyond being a mere "good
trainer" today.
choice_data_list: So I'm not a "good trainer" anymore?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, that's not at all fitting right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Can I praise you with the best compliment I can
muster up?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Here I go! All the fans out there watching,
say it with me! Ready? One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Who's a good little prodigy?! You are, Trainer!
Yes, you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chorus of praise echoes throughout the
stands, symbolizing the gravity of our
achievement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your miraculous Derby win,
Super Creek!
